communication.name: translateText
communication.description: Performs a Google translation. Example: {'name': 'translateText', 'parameters': {'q': 'translate from english to german: good morning'}}

q.description: Defines the translation query. Should follow the format 'translate from [source language] to [target language]: [text to translate]'.

communication.name: makeAudioOrVideoCallToYourContact
communication.description: Initiates a call (audio or video) to another user by their User ID. The type of call is determined by 'isVideo'. If 'isVideo' is true, it initiates a video call; if false, an audio call. Example: {'name': 'makeAudioOrVideoCallToYourContact', 'parameters': {'toUserID': '1234', 'isVideo': true}}

communication.name: sendCryptoToYourContact
communication.description: Sends a specified amount of cryptocurrency to another user by their User ID or address'. Example: {'name': 'sendCryptoToYourContact', 'parameters': {'toUserID': '1234', 'amount': 10.5, 'symbol': 'ETH'}}

communication.name: requestCryptoFromYourContact
communication.description: Requests a specified amount of cryptocurrency from another user by their User ID. Example: {'name': 'requestCryptoFromYourContact', 'parameters': {'fromUserID': '1234', 'amount': 5.2, 'symbol': 'BTC'}}

communication.name: buyCrypto
communication.description: Buys a specified amount of cryptocurrency using a specific symbol. Example: {'name': 'buyCrypto', 'parameters': {'amount': 100, 'fromSymbol': 'USD', 'toSymbol': 'BTC'}}

communication.name: sellCrypto
communication.description: Sells a specified amount of cryptocurrency for a specific symbol. Example: {'name': 'sellCrypto', 'parameters': {'amount': 50, 'fromSymbol': 'BTC', 'toSymbol': 'USD'}}

communication.name: sendChatMessageToYourContacts
communication.description: Sends a message between users by their User ID. Either as a direct message or in a group. Example: {'name': 'sendChatMessageToYourContacts', 'parameters': {'userIDs': ['1234', '5678'], 'message': 'Hello', 'isGroupMessage': false}}

communication.name: sendContactRequestToUsers
communication.description: Sends a contact request to specified User IDs.

userIDs.description: The unique identifiers of the users to whom the contact requests will be sent.

communication.name: deleteYourContacts
communication.description: Deletes specified users from the contact list.

userIDs.description: The unique identifiers of the users to be deleted from the contact list.

communication.name: deleteYourConversations
communication.description: Deletes specified conversations from the user's conversation list.

conversationIDs.description: The unique identifiers of the conversations to be deleted.

communication.name: findMutualFreeTimeWithYourContacts
communication.description: Finds a mutual free time slot with the specified users.

userIDs.description: The users with whom to find a mutual free time slot.

start.description: The start of the time range within which to find a mutual free time slot.

end.description: The end of the time range within which to find a mutual free time slot.

communication.name: scheduleCallWithYourContacts
communication.description: Schedules a call with specified users at a specified time.

userIDs.description: The IDs of the users with whom to schedule the call.

time.description: The time at which to schedule the call.

communication.name: getYourCryptoTransactions
communication.description: Retrieves the transaction history of the user for a specific cryptocurrency.

symbol.description: The symbol of the cryptocurrency to fetch the transaction history for.

communication.name: fetchConversationsWithYourContacts
communication.description: Fetches conversations based on provided filters.

filters.description: The filters to apply when fetching conversations. Possible filters can be by participants, keywords, dates, etc.

communication.name: fetchYourContactsFromConversations
communication.description: Fetches contacts based on provided conversation IDs and filters.

conversationIDs.description: The unique identifiers of the conversations to fetch contacts from.

filters.description: Optional. The filters to apply when fetching contacts. Possible filters can be by name, email, user IDs, etc.

onlineStatus.description: The online status of the contacts to fetch. Can be 'online', 'offline', 'away', etc.

communication.name: inviteFriendsByEmail
communication.description: Invite friends to join the application by sending them an invitation email.

emails.description: List of email addresses to invite.

personalMessage.description: Optional. A personal message to include in the invitation email.

communication.name: sendSuperDappMailToYourContacts
communication.description: Send a persistent message to the inbox of selected contacts. Different than regular messages which are like chat, this is more like mail within the app.

communication.name: shareFolderWithYourContacts
communication.description: Share a folder with selected contacts.

permission.description: The permission level (write or read) to grant to the recipients.

communication.name: sendEmail
communication.description: Send an email to specified recipients with a given subject and message.

to.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

message.description: The content of the email message.

data_processing.name: createFolder
data_processing.description: Create a new folder in the user's file storage.

folderName.description: The name of the new folder.

data_processing.name: createOrMoveTextFile
data_processing.description: Create a new text file in the user's file storage or move a downloaded file handle to the user's local storage for persistence.

fileName.description: The name of the new file or the downloaded file to be moved.

fileContent.description: The content to write in the new file. Not required when moving a downloaded file.

downloadedFilePath.description: The path of the downloaded file to be moved. Required when moving a downloaded file.

data_processing.name: summarizeURLs
data_processing.description: Creates a summary of the content at the provided URLs. The summary will be concise, highlight the key points, and accept a maximum token size for the summary. URLs must point to text-based content (e.g., TXT, CSV, HTML, JSON, XML, etc.) or PDF files.

context.description: Optional. Additional context to guide the summarization.

maxTokens.description: The maximum token size for the summary. Should be at least 1000 usually for usefulness.

sensory_perception.name: doImageAnalysis
sensory_perception.description: Performs a Google Lens call based on an image URL or file handle. Can do image recognition and transcribe it or extract text. Example: {'name': 'doImageAnalysis', 'parameters': {'url': 'https://example.com/image.jpg'}}

url.description: Defines the URL or file handle of an image to perform the Google Lens call.
